summary: Full-stack testing of EmailBoost app: backend API tests (7/9 pass with 2 test-script issues fixed), frontend UI tests all major flows passing including auth, demo generation (Claude AI), pricing, dashboard, and logout.

minor.issue: Email is lowercased by server (TEST_ prefix becomes test_) - minor normalization, not a real bug
Requires 'origin' field in request body (CheckoutRequest model has origin: str required) - not documented in test context

ui_bugs.issue: dashboard-upgrade-btn not found for pro user (expected - pro users don't need upgrade btn). export-favorites-csv-btn not found - may only render when favorites exist (0 favorites on admin account)
Free plan CTA button shows a spinner/loading state instead of 'Get Started' text when user is logged in as Pro - possible conditional rendering issue

issues: Free card CTA button stuck in loading state for pro users

action_items: Verify export-favorites-csv-btn renders when favorites are present in Dashboard
Check why Free pricing card CTA shows loading spinner for logged-in Pro users
Stripe checkout requires 'origin' field - ensure frontend passes it correctly
critical_code_review_comments: CheckoutRequest model requires 'origin: str' but test context didn't mention it - verify frontend sends origin correctly
Dashboard: export-favorites-csv-btn missing when 0 favorites - may be conditionally rendered (OK) but should verify
server.py STRIPE_API_KEY is 'sk_test_emergent' - ensure StripeCheckout handles this test key properly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_emailboost.py cover health, auth (register/login/me), generate (Claude AI real call), favorites CRUD, Stripe. All core flows pass. Frontend: login/logout, demo generation with real AI results (5-15s), pricing with BEST VALUE badge, dashboard - all working. Minor: export-favorites-csv-btn only renders when favorites exist (conditional). Free pricing card CTA spinner for pro users may be a minor rendering issue.
